94 Brhai Samhita
The years composing the 7th yuga of Jupiter presided over
hy the Manes are Hemalamba, Vilambi. Vikari, Sarvariand Plava.
In the first year there will be stormy rains accompanied by the
six-fold calamities. In the second year both the rains and crops
will be scanty. In the third there will be great havoc caused by
floods. In the fourth year there will be famine and in the last
year known as Plava there will be good rains and prosperity.
[The metre is JTSTsppaT.]
